job_title: Software Quality Assurance and Support Analyst
job_nlp_title: Software Quality Assurance and Support Analyst
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Quality Assurance Engineer
core_skills: Software testing, Test plan development, Test case development, Test script development, Functional testing
skill_match_scores: Software testing:1.0, Test plan development:0.0, Test case development:0.5, Test script development:0.5, Functional testing:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT or related field, 2-3 years of experience, Ability to work a flexible schedule, Attention to detail, Customer service skills, Oral and written communication skills, Ability to follow appropriate procedures
core_responsibilities: Develop and execute structured test plans, test cases, and test scripts in alignment with industry best practices, Perform functional, integration, regression, and user acceptance testing (UAT) for software solutions, Utilize testing tools to track, manage, and report defects, Collaborate with developers to identify and resolve software issues before deployment, Ensure that solutions meet business and technical requirements through rigorous verification, Apply testing methodologies to improve test coverage and defect detection, Develop and refine QA processes to enhance software quality and reduce release risks, Participate in Agile/Scrum meetings to provide QA input during planning and retrospectives, Implement and maintain automated testing frameworks for increased efficiency, Work closely with BT teams to ensure smooth implementation of software, system updates, and new features
job_summary: FTI is a company dedicated to leading the way in construction, engineering, manufacturing, and renewable energy, fostering a Culture of Care among its team members. The Software Quality Assurance and Support Analyst I role focuses on applying standardized testing principles to enhance software quality and performance while collaborating with various teams to ensure application reliability and support.
